name: VIYEKO Architecture
description: Production architectural overview of the VIYEKO roadside assistance platform.

stack.frontend: React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion
stack.realtime: Ably WebSockets (Regional Broadcasts & Private Bid Channels)

keyContexts.AuthContext: Manages Global Session, User metadata, and strictly fetched DB Roles (Driver vs Provider)
keyContexts.useRequests: Custom hook bridging Supabase persistent state with Ably sub-second updates

dataFlow.auth: Google/Email -> Supabase Auth -> PostgreSQL Trigger -> Profiles Table
dataFlow.bidding: Driver (Ably Broadcast) -> Garage -> Garage Bids (Ably Private Channel + Supabase JSONB update) -> Driver Accepts -> Supabase Row Level Security enforced update

security.RowLevelSecurity: Strict policies enforcing that drivers only mutate their own requests and providers only update requests they are bidding on.
security.AblyTokens: Root keys removed. Edge Function via Supabase issues short-lived JWTs to the client.

productionRisks.status: Documented. Mitigation strategies outlined for Data Race Conditions, SEO, and Offline Sync.
